meanings.definition: the act of changing one thing or position for another
examples: his switch on abortion cost him the election

meanings.definition: change over, change around, as to a new order or sequence
exchange or give (something) in exchange for
lay aside, abandon, or leave for another
examples: switch to a different brand of beer

meanings.definition: make a shift in or exchange of
examples: First Joe led; then we switched

meanings.definition: cause to go on or to be engaged or set in operation
flog with or as if with a flexible rod
reverse (a direction, attitude, or course of action)
